languages.original_text: "Attack him?" {n}Eogunn twists a bolt on his beard in confusion.{/n} "I merely used him as a visual aid for a harmless demonstration conducted under controlled conditions. Furthermore, in the process, I identified several faults in his augments and repaired them. I assure you that any effects on his organic components were negligible."

languages.text: "Напал?" {n}Эоганн озадаченно подкручивает болт на бороде.{/n} "Я лишь использовал его как наглядное пособие для безобидной демонстрации, проведенный в контролируемых условиях. Более того, в процессе я выявил несколько неисправностей в его аугментах и исправил их. Уверяю вас, что органические компоненты пострадали незначительно".

"Attack him?" {n}Eogunn twists a bolt on his beard in confusion.{/n} "I merely used him as a visual aid for a harmless demonstration conducted under controlled conditions. Furthermore, in the process, I identified several faults in his augments and repaired them. I assure you that any effects on his organic components were negligible."

Furthermore, in the process, I identified several faults in his augments and repaired them. I assure you that any effects on his organic components were negligible."

languages.text: 「彼を攻撃した？」{n}エオガンは困惑して髭のボルトをくるくる回す。{/n}「私は彼を、制御された環境下で無害な実演の視覚補助として使っただけだ。さらに、その過程で彼のフェルム・サンクタムの欠陥をいくつか特定し、修理した。彼の有機成分への影響は微々たるものだったことを保証する。」
languages.original_text: "Attack him?" {n}Eogunn twists a bolt on his beard in confusion.{/n} "I merely used him as a visual aid for a harmless demonstration conducted under controlled conditions. What's more, in the process, I identified several faults in his Ferrum Sanctum and repaired them. I assure you that any effects on his organic components were negligible."

languages.text: "Angegriffen?" {n}Eogunn spielt verwirrt mit einem Bolzen seines Bartes.{/n} "Ich habe ihn lediglich als visuelle Unterstützung für eine harmlose Demonstration unter kontrollierten Bedingungen benutzt. Überdies habe ich mehrere Fehler in seinen Augmentationen erkannt und umgehend repariert. Ich versichere Euch, dass die Auswirkungen auf seine organischen Komponenten vernachlässigbar waren."
languages.original_text: "Attack him?" {n}Eogunn twists a bolt on his beard in confusion.{/n} "I merely used him as a visual aid for a harmless demonstration conducted under controlled conditions. Furthermore, in the process, I identified several faults in his augments and repaired them. I assure you that any effects on his organic components were negligible."

traits.locale_text: "Angegriffen? {n}Eogunn spielt verwirrt mit einem Bolzen seines Bartes.{/n} "Ich habe ihn lediglich als visuelle Unterstützung für eine harmlose Demonstration unter kontrollierten Bedingungen benutzt. Überdies habe ich mehrere Fehler in seinen Augmentationen erkannt und umgehend repariert. Ich versichere Euch, dass die Auswirkungen auf seine organischen Komponenten vernachlässigbar waren."

languages.text: «¿Atacado?». {n}Eogunn se gira una tuerca de la barba con expresión confusa.{/n} «Simplemente lo he utilizado como recurso visual para hacer una inofensiva demostración bajo condiciones controladas. Además, gracias a ello he podido identificar y reparar varios defectos en sus aumentos. Le aseguro que el efecto sobre sus componentes orgánicos ha sido nimio».
languages.original_text: "Attack him?" {n}Eogunn twists a bolt on his beard in confusion.{/n} "I merely used him as a visual aid for a harmless demonstration conducted under controlled conditions. Furthermore, in the process, I identified several faults in his augments and repaired them. I assure you that any effects on his organic components were negligible."

traits.locale_text: «¿Atacado?». {n}Eogunn se gira una tuerca de la barba con expresión confusa.{/n} «Simplemente lo he utilizado como recurso visual para hacer una inofensiva demostración bajo condiciones controladas. Además, gracias a ello he podido identificar y reparar varios defectos en sus aumentos. Le aseguro que el efecto sobre sus componentes orgánicos ha sido nimio».

languages.text: "Ona saldırmak mı?" {n}Eogunn, kafa karışıklığıyla sakalındaki bir cıvatayı çeviriyor.{/n} "Onu sadece kontrollü koşullar altında gerçekleştirilen zararsız bir gösteri için görsel yardımcı olarak kullandım. Dahası, bu süreçte ogmentlerindeki birkaç hatayı tespit edip onardım. Organik bileşenleri üzerindeki etkilerin önemsiz olduğuna sizi temin ederim."
languages.original_text: "Attack him?" {n}Eogunn twists a bolt on his beard in confusion.{/n} "I merely used him as a visual aid for a harmless demonstration conducted under controlled conditions. Furthermore, in the process, I identified several faults in his augments and repaired them. I assure you that any effects on his organic components were negligible."

Dahası, bu süreçte ogmentlerindeki birkaç hatayı tespit edip onardım. Organik bileşenleri üzerindeki etkilerin önemsiz olduğuna sizi temin ederim."

languages.text: « Attaqué ? {n}s'étonne Eogunnn en tortillant un boulon dans sa barbe.{/n} Je l'ai simplement utilisé comme support visuel pour vous faire une démonstration inoffensive dans des conditions contrôlées. Ce faisant, j'ai également identifié plusieurs défauts dans ses augmentations que j'ai pris soin de rectifier. Je peux vous assurer que les effets sur ses composants organiques ont été négligeables. »
languages.original_text: "Attack him?" {n}Eogunn twists a bolt on his beard in confusion.{/n} "I merely used him as a visual aid for a harmless demonstration conducted under controlled conditions. Furthermore, in the process, I identified several faults in his augments and repaired them. I assure you that any effects on his organic components were negligible."

traits.locale_text: « Attaqué ? {n}s'étonne Eogunnn en tortillant un boulon dans sa barbe.{/n} Je l'ai simplement utilisé comme support visuel pour vous faire une démonstration inoffensive dans des conditions contrôlées. Ce faisant, j'ai également identifié plusieurs défauts dans ses augmentations que j'ai pris soin de rectifier. Je peux vous assurer que les effets sur ses composants organiques ont été négligeables. »

languages.text: “攻击他？”{n}伊奥贡困惑地拧了拧胡须上的螺栓。{/n}“我只是在受控条件下把他当做一个无害演示的视觉道具。更何况，在此过程中，我还发现了他植入物的几个故障并予以修复。我向您保证，对他有机组织的影响微乎其微。”
languages.original_text: "Attack him?" {n}Eogunn twists a bolt on his beard in confusion.{/n} "I merely used him as a visual aid for a harmless demonstration conducted under controlled conditions. Furthermore, in the process, I identified several faults in his augments and repaired them. I assure you that any effects on his organic components were negligible."
